data.title: Reliance Communications’ Key Real Estate Assets Attached Under PMLA Orders
data.description:
Easter Sale - 70% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Reliance Communications Limited ( (IN:RCOM) ) has shared an announcement.

Reliance Communications has disclosed that India’s Adjudicating Authority under the Prevention of Money Laundering Act has confirmed provisional attachment orders on multiple properties held by the company and its wholly owned subsidiaries, Campion Properties and Reliance Realty. The attached assets include major land parcels and commercial buildings in New Delhi, Navi Mumbai, Chennai, Bhubaneswar and Pune, notably encompassing the Dhirubhai Ambani Knowledge City campus and Millennium Business Park holdings.

These confirmations formalise earlier enforcement actions by the Directorate of Enforcement and add a significant layer of legal and operational complexity as Reliance Communications remains in corporate insolvency resolution. The resolution professional overseeing the business is now seeking legal advice on the implications of these attachments, which could influence the value and availability of real-estate assets in the ongoing resolution process and potentially affect recoveries for creditors and other stakeholders.

More about Reliance Communications Limited

Reliance Communications Limited is an Indian telecommunications company that has historically provided mobile, enterprise connectivity and related digital services across the country. The company is currently under corporate insolvency resolution, with its affairs and those of key real-estate holding subsidiaries such as Campion Properties and Reliance Realty managed by a resolution professional appointed under India’s Insolvency and Bankruptcy Code.

Average Trading Volume: 899,260

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: 2.82B INR

data.description:

Lion Rock Resources ( (TSE:ROAR) ) has provided an announcement.

Lion Rock Resources has clarified details of its recently announced Media Agency Agreement with Global One Media Group, confirming that the pact took effect on February 24, 2026. Under the agreement, Global One will provide marketing, communications, and investor relations services aimed at expanding Lion Rock’s market visibility and shareholder outreach.

The arrangement is still subject to acceptance by the TSX Venture Exchange, leaving a regulatory step before the partnership can fully proceed. If approved, the deal could strengthen Lion Rock’s investor engagement as it advances its gold and lithium exploration assets in North America, potentially improving its profile among resource-focused investors.

More about Lion Rock Resources

Lion Rock Resources Inc. is a Canadian mineral exploration company focused on advancing high-grade gold and lithium projects in North America. Its flagship Volney Project is located in South Dakota’s historic Black Hills gold district, and the company is led by an experienced technical and capital markets team with a track record in discovery, development, and financing.

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: C$29.55M

data.description:

Guangdong – Hong Kong Greater Bay Area Holdings Ltd. ( (HK:1396) ) has provided an update.

Guangdong – Hong Kong Greater Bay Area Holdings Ltd. has issued an overseas regulatory announcement to comply with Hong Kong listing rules requiring equal information dissemination. The company noted that an announcement dated 12 April 2026 has been published on the Singapore Exchange website and reposted in Hong Kong solely to ensure Hong Kong investors receive the same information.

The reposting does not constitute any offer or solicitation to buy securities and is framed with standard securities law disclaimers, particularly regarding the absence of a U.S. public offering. The move underscores the company’s adherence to cross-market regulatory requirements and highlights its coordination between the Hong Kong and Singapore markets for investor disclosure purposes.

More about Guangdong – Hong Kong Greater Bay Area Holdings Ltd.

Guangdong – Hong Kong Greater Bay Area Holdings Ltd. is a company incorporated in the Cayman Islands with limited liability and listed in Hong Kong under stock code 1396. The board comprises executive and independent non-executive directors, with Luo Jieping serving as chairman and executive director, indicating a conventional listed-company governance structure.

data.title: CHTC Fong’s Delays Circular on Major Subsidiary Disposal Plan
data.description:
Easter Sale - 70% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

The latest announcement is out from CHTC Fong’s International Company Limited ( (HK:0641) ).

CHTC Fong’s International Company Limited has announced a delay in sending a key shareholder circular relating to a potential very substantial disposal of an entire interest in a wholly-owned subsidiary via a listing-for-sale. The circular, originally expected by 10 April 2026, will now be dispatched on or before 15 April 2026 to allow more time to prepare, update and finalise required financial information, slightly extending the timetable for shareholder consideration of the planned transaction.

The postponement affects the distribution of the circular and the notice of the special general meeting, where shareholders are expected to review and vote on the proposed disposal. While the delay is relatively short, it underscores the complexity of assembling comprehensive valuation and financial disclosures under Hong Kong listing rules, and may briefly defer clarity for investors on the transaction’s implications for the group’s future structure and strategy.

More about CHTC Fong’s International Company Limited

CHTC Fong’s International Company Limited is a Bermuda-incorporated company listed in Hong Kong under stock code 641. The group operates in the industrial and manufacturing sector, with its business conducted through various subsidiaries, and is overseen by a board comprising executive, non-executive and independent non-executive directors.

data.description:

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

The latest announcement is out from Samvardhana Motherson International Limited ( (IN:MOTHERSON) ).

Samvardhana Motherson International Limited has announced the dissolution of SMRC Automotive Interior Modules Croatia d.o.o., an indirect wholly owned subsidiary, following its removal from the Commercial Court of Zagreb’s register effective April 11, 2026. The Croatian unit, which had negligible turnover and net worth relative to the group and no foreseeable new business while incurring significant annual costs, was wound up as part of a streamlining move that is not expected to materially affect the company’s consolidated financials but should reduce overheads and simplify its corporate structure.

More about Samvardhana Motherson International Limited

Samvardhana Motherson International Limited is a diversified automotive components manufacturer, supplying modules and systems to global vehicle makers. The group focuses on interior, exterior, wiring and other auto parts, with an international footprint that includes multiple subsidiaries serving various regional and customer segments.

data.description:

  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Xuanzhu Biopharmaceutical Co., Ltd. Class H ( (HK:2575) ) just unveiled an announcement.

Xuanzhu Biopharmaceutical has received a notification from the China Securities Regulatory Commission approving the filing for its H share full circulation plan. The approval covers the conversion of 357,245,794 unlisted shares held by six shareholders into the same number of H shares, which, subject to Stock Exchange approval and other regulatory procedures, will be listed and traded on the Main Board within a 12‑month validity period.

The company has not yet finalized its detailed implementation plan for the H share full circulation and related conversion and listing steps, and will provide further updates as required under Hong Kong listing and inside information rules. The move, once completed, is expected to increase the liquidity and tradable float of Xuanzhu Biopharmaceutical’s shares, but the company has cautioned shareholders and potential investors to act carefully while the process remains subject to outstanding regulatory procedures.

More about Xuanzhu Biopharmaceutical Co., Ltd. Class H

Xuanzhu Biopharmaceutical Co., Ltd. is a China-based biopharmaceutical company listed in Hong Kong, focusing on the development and commercialization of innovative drugs. Its H shares trade on the Main Board of the Stock Exchange of Hong Kong, giving it access to international capital and a broader investor base.

data.description:

  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Otello Corporation ASA ( (GB:0FI5) ) just unveiled an announcement.

Otello Corporation ASA has continued its ongoing share buyback program, with Pareto Securities AS acquiring 124,760 shares on the company’s behalf between 30 March and 10 April 2026 at an average price of NOK 18.72. Since the program began, Otello has repurchased a total of 877,816 shares for NOK 15.68 million at an average price of NOK 17.86, signaling an active approach to capital allocation and balance sheet optimization.

The buyback is being executed under an authorization granted at the extraordinary general meeting held on 15 September 2025, and is capped at NOK 20 per share and 3,689,541 shares in total. Following these latest transactions, Otello now holds 4,567,357 treasury shares, a position that may support future capital management options and reflects management’s confidence in the company’s valuation and long-term prospects.

More about Otello Corporation ASA

Otello Corporation ASA is a Norway-based technology company listed on the stock exchange, operating in the software and internet services space. The company focuses on digital products and solutions, and actively manages its capital structure through share buyback programs and treasury share holdings as part of its shareholder value strategy.

data.title: Selkirk Copper Upsizes Bought Deal Financing to $30 Million for Minto Mine Development
data.description:
Easter Sale - 70% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Venerable Ventures ( (TSE:SCMI) ) has provided an announcement.

Selkirk Copper Mines has increased its previously announced bought deal private placement to roughly $30 million following strong investor demand, selling a mix of flow-through and common shares through a syndicate led by Canaccord Genuity. The deal structure includes an additional underwriters’ option and standard commissions, with securities to be issued via exempt private placement in Canada, the U.S. and select other jurisdictions, subject to regulatory approvals and a statutory hold period.

Proceeds from the financing will be used primarily to advance development of the Minto Mine and for working capital and general corporate purposes, underscoring Selkirk Copper’s commitment to expanding its critical mineral production capacity. The company has committed to incur and renounce qualifying Canadian exploration expenses tied to the flow-through component, offering tax benefits to investors while reinforcing its exploration spending obligations in the Canadian critical minerals space.

More about Venerable Ventures

Selkirk Copper Mines Inc. is a Canadian mining company focused on the development of the Minto Mine in the Yukon, with its shares listed on the TSX Venture Exchange, Frankfurt and OTCQB markets. The company operates in the copper and critical minerals sector, targeting investors through equity and flow-through share offerings to fund exploration and mine development activities.

Jash Engineering Ltd. ( (IN:JASH) ) has shared an update.

Jash Engineering Ltd. has notified the stock exchanges that it has published newspaper advertisements in the Financial Express (Mumbai edition) and Choutha Sansar, announcing details of a postal ballot notice and e-voting information for shareholders. The disclosure, made under Regulation 30 of the SEBI Listing Regulations, underscores the company’s adherence to mandated corporate governance and transparency norms, ensuring investors are properly informed about upcoming shareholder decision-making processes.

By circulating the postal ballot and e-voting details through widely read English and Hindi newspapers, the company is seeking broad shareholder participation and regulatory compliance. This step highlights its continued alignment with SEBI requirements and supports minority shareholder engagement in key corporate matters that may be put to vote via the postal ballot mechanism.

data.title: Manitou Group Mourns Chairwoman Jacqueline Himsworth, Moves to Safeguard Governance Continuity
data.description:
Easter Sale - 70% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Manitou BF ( (FR:MTU) ) just unveiled an update.

Manitou Group has announced the death of its Chairwoman of the Board, Jacqueline Himsworth, who passed away at the age of 82, marking the loss of a central figure in the family‑controlled equipment maker. A long‑time shareholder and director, she helped transform the business from its Braud & Faucheux roots into a global leader, and since becoming chair in 2017, she was seen internally as the guardian of the group’s values and long‑term vision.

Renowned for balancing technological innovation with a strong human focus, Himsworth championed resilient, sustainable growth and worked to bring a new generation onto the board to secure continuity of the family legacy and strategic stability. The board will meet in the coming days to organize the succession and ensure governance continuity, as the company’s 6,100 employees join her family in mourning while the group seeks to preserve her cultural and strategic imprint on its future direction.

The most recent analyst rating on (FR:MTU) stock is a Hold with a EUR20.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Manitou BF stock, see the FR:MTU Stock Forecast page.

More about Manitou BF

Manitou Group is a global reference in material handling, personnel lifting and earthmoving equipment, serving the construction, agriculture and industrial sectors. Through its Manitou and Gehl brands and a network of 800 dealers, the France‑headquartered company designs, produces and distributes machinery and services aimed at improving working conditions, safety and performance worldwide, and reported €2.6 billion in revenue in 2025.

Average Trading Volume: 22,059

Technical Sentiment Signal: Strong Buy

Current Market Cap: €820.9M
